name: Berserker's Fury
description: Every successful hit chains a x2 multiplier onto the next attack check.

name: Dead Eye
description: Widens the Great zone by 50%. Precision is rewarded.

name: Slow Motion
description: Slows the skill check pointer by 25%. Time bends to your will.

name: Iron Wall
description: Each successful parry gives +3 flat armor. Miss and you get nothing.

name: Thorns
description: When you land a Great parry, reflect 30% of enemy damage back.

name: Vampiric Edge
description: Heal 20% of damage dealt on Great attacks. Blood fuels your blade.

name: Lucky Coin
description: On a miss, 30% chance to re-roll as a success. Fortune favors the bold.

name: Combo King
description: If all 3 attack checks hit success or better, gain a x3 damage bonus on total.

name: Glass Cannon
description: Doubles all attack damage. But parry defense is halved. High risk, high reward.

name: Second Wind
description: Heal 5 HP at the end of each combat round. Slow but steady recovery.

name: Adrenaline Rush
description: Adds +1 extra round to every skill check. More spins = bigger multiplier.

name: Critical Mass
description: Great hits multiply damage by x4 instead of x1. Ordinary hits unchanged.

name: Counterattack
description: Each successful parry deals 4 damage to the enemy. Defense is offense.

name: Tunnel Vision
description: Shrinks success zone by 20% but doubles the Great zone. All or nothing.

name: Soul Harvest
description: For every enemy killed, permanently gain +1 base damage. Power grows with kills.

name: Shield Bash
description: Great parries stun the enemy, reducing their next attack by 40%.

name: Double Down
description: Misses now deal 3 damage to YOU, but successful hits deal x1.8 damage.

name: Bone Armor
description: Gain +1 permanent max HP for every enemy killed. The dead protect you.

name: Echo Strike
description: Your 3rd attack repeats your best hit from this round. Pure devastation.

name: Witch's Brew
description: At round end, 50% chance to heal 8 HP. 50% chance to lose 3 HP. Gamble.

name: Crit Fisher
description: Success zone shrinks 40%, but Great zone triples. Fish for the orange.

name: Last Stand
description: Below 25% HP, all attack damage is tripled. Fight like you have nothing to lose.

name: Siphon Soul
description: Great attacks steal 2 points of enemy defence permanently. Weaken them.

name: Overcharge
description: +2 extra rounds on skill checks, but pointer is 30% faster. Risk vs reward.

name: Bleed
description: Any successful attack inflicts bleed: 2 damage per round for 3 rounds.

name: Retribution
description: Gain +1% damage for every 1% of HP you're missing. Pain is power.

name: Resonance
description: Consecutive Great hits amplify: 1st = normal, 2nd = x2, 3rd = x4. Stack the crits.

name: Fortify
description: Each successful parry in a row gives +2 more armor than the last. Stack up.

name: Doppelganger
description: At round end, your total damage is dealt a second time at 40% power. Ghost hit.

name: Phoenix Feather
description: Once per stage, revive with 50% HP on death. You get one more chance.
